query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS backupMetadata (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  backupName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  backupType ENUM('daily', 'weekly', 'manual') NOT NULL,
  s3Key VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  s3Url TEXT NOT NULL,
  fileSize BIGINT,
  rowCounts JSON,
  checksums JSON,
  status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'verified') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  verificationStatus ENUM('not_verified', 'verified', 'failed') DEFAULT 'not_verified' NOT NULL,
  errorMessage TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  verifiedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdBy INT,
  retentionDays INT DEFAULT 30 NOT NULL,
  dataOriginSummary JSON,
  INDEX backupMetadata_status_idx (status),
  INDEX backupMetadata_backupType_idx (backupType),
  INDEX backupMetadata_createdAt_idx (createdAt),
  INDEX backupMetadata_expiresAt_idx (expiresAt),
  CONSTRAINT backupMetadata_createdBy_fk FOREIGN KEY (createdBy) REFERENCES users(id)
);
command:
